text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's finally the day of the Satsuki Sho, part of the
Classic Triple Crown tour. Everyone is on the
edge of their seat in anticipation of the explosive
race that's about to unfold.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Meanwhile, in the runners' tunnel, Mihono
Bourbon is psyching herself up for the race. Rice
Shower tells her about how she looks up to her, as
well as how she wants to catch up to her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matikanetannhauser chooses to simply watch
them from afar.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She stands awkwardly off to the side, waiting for
them to finish their conversation. In any case, the
Satsuki Sho is about to begin!
